position: The GUI may default-enable 'Help us improve the experience' for no-content product telemetry and 'Industry experience co-building' for anonymized workflow patterns and approved methodology summaries. The wording may be friendly, but it must not be misleading. Raw client material and raw project knowledge are never included by default.
purpose: evaluate workflow quality and failure modes
allowed_by_default: agent route events without user text
allowed_by_default_when_industry_experie: anonymized project relay patterns without raw source filenames
not_allowed_by_default_even_when_industr: raw source references that reveal client or project names
forbidden_by_default: personal data that has not been redacted
client names unless tenant explicitly allows them
minimum_controls: auth token stored in environment variable or secret store
local export bundle for GUI review
default_enabled_rationale: experience_telemetry defaults on because it contains no user content. industry_experience_sharing defaults off because it requires explicit admin consent under GDPR, PIPL, and similar regulations before any anonymized workflow patterns or methodology summaries leave the tenant.
